name: Hangzhou Weiguang Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Weiguang Electronic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various fan motors primarily in China. Its products include electronically commutated and controlling motors, external rotor motors, shaded pole motors, terminal motors, plug motors, capacitance motors, and cross flow motors. The company also offers axial fans, centrifugal fans, fan blades, grids, rings, and brackets, as well as air flow products. Hangzhou Weiguang Electronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
